source_filing: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 31, 2025)
original_text: International sales increased 13% in 2025, compared to the prior year.
modified_text: Amazon's International segment sales increased 3% in 2025 compared to the prior year, with the sales growth primarily reflecting increased unit sales.
claim: Amazon's International segment net sales rose 3% year over year in fiscal 2025.
citation_as_written: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 (MD&A, Results of Operations — Net Sales, International)
notes: Single-figure fabrication: the International segment growth rate of 13% was changed to a plausible-but-wrong 3%. The surrounding qualitative driver language ('primarily reflecting increased unit sales') is faithful to the source, making the wrong number subtle. The source value is 13%.
